title: ‚Äč‚Äč‚ÄčLocal government reorganisation: letter to council leaders with elections in May 2026
body: "On 18 December 2025,¬†the Minister of State for Local Government and Homelessness, Alison McGovern MP, wrote to council leaders in local government reorganisation areas with elections in May 2026.¬†  This letter invites councils to¬†set out¬†their¬†views on:   the potential postponement of their local election in May 2026 whether doing this would allow them to better deliver local government reorganisation   Representations should be made by 15 January 2026. "
